mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, team_id, activity_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, group_price, quantity, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_order (order_no, user_id, team_id, activity_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, group_price, quantity, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{teamId}, #{activityId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{groupPrice}, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM group_buy_order WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM group_buy_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM group_buy_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM group_buy_order WHERE team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_order SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE group_buy_order SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
